offer: For accountants managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, inefficient consolidation causes late financial reporting. We provide a data aggregation tool instead of manual data entry and reconciliation.
problem: Inefficient consolidation of financial statements from multiple clients
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM 20-50 accountants with demo video links
Participate in forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data import and basic data visualization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
